goal: Unify local runtime baseline around the 170-card source of truth by routing showcase UI through cardsSource, aligning data-contract runtime state fields with BattleV2, and strengthening baseline drift checks.
constraints: Treat local repository as source of truth for this pass; do not overwrite local work from remote.
